headline: Which S&P 500 ETF Is Better in 2026? State Street's SPY or iShares' IVV?
summary: IVV's 0.03% expense ratio and $886 billion in assets make it a compelling alternative for buy-and-hold investors seeking broad market exposure.

headline: ETF Inflows Smash Records, Tracking Toward Historic $2.3 Trillion in 2026
summary: A new State Street report shows investors continue to favor ETFs, including actively managed and fixed-income funds.

headline: Trump Rings Opening Bell From Oval Office to Mark Trump Accounts
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump rang the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq from the Oval Office on Monday, a celebratory event to mark the launch of Trump Accounts, a new investment vehicle for children.Most Read from BloombergGreece Offers Bounty to Catch Ravenous Fish Lured by Warming SeaOil, Gas Tankers Cross Hormuz Via Oman-Side Route After U-TurnsThe Tanker Tycoon Making Millions on Hormuz Shuttle RunsModi’s Flagship Biofuel Push Faces Backlash From Motorists
